rule: Keep primary navigation to 7 items or fewer
do_pattern: Group related items under clear dropdown categories
dont_pattern: Expose every page link in the main navigation bar

rule: Make primary CTA visually dominant with contrasting color
do_pattern: Use brand contrasting color with clear action verb and padding
dont_pattern: Use ghost buttons or low-contrast colors for primary actions

rule: Maintain clear heading hierarchy with consistent scale
do_pattern: Use a modular scale like 1.25 ratio from base size 16px
dont_pattern: Use random font sizes without systematic relationship

rule: Use consistent spacing system based on 8px grid
do_pattern: Apply multiples of 8px for all margins and padding
dont_pattern: Use arbitrary pixel values with no system

rule: Ensure WCAG AA minimum 4.5:1 contrast for body text
do_pattern: Use dark text on light backgrounds or light text on dark
dont_pattern: Use medium gray text on light backgrounds

rule: Label every input visibly above the field not as placeholder only
do_pattern: Place persistent label above input with descriptive text
dont_pattern: Use placeholder text as the only label

do_pattern: Size all interactive elements at least 44px in both dimensions
dont_pattern: Use small links or buttons below 30px height

rule: Show skeleton screens instead of spinners for content
do_pattern: Replace content areas with animated placeholder shapes
dont_pattern: Show only a centered spinner with no content preview

rule: Use generous whitespace between sections minimum 64px
do_pattern: Separate major sections with padding-block of 80-120px
dont_pattern: Cram sections together with minimal spacing

rule: Provide immediate visual feedback for all user actions
do_pattern: Show state change within 100ms of interaction
dont_pattern: Leave buttons and inputs with no hover or active state styling

rule: Show inline validation errors next to the relevant field
do_pattern: Display specific red error text below the input
dont_pattern: Show a single generic alert at top of form
dont_code: There were errors in your submission

rule: Use responsive images with proper aspect ratios and lazy loading
do_pattern: Serve multiple sizes with srcset and lazy load below fold
dont_pattern: Serve single full-size image without lazy loading

rule: Use smooth scroll with reduced motion media query respect
do_pattern: Enable smooth scroll but honor prefers-reduced-motion
do_code: html { scroll-behavior: smooth } @media (prefers-reduced-motion) { html { scroll-behavior: auto } }
dont_pattern: Force animations without reduced motion fallback
dont_code: html { scroll-behavior: smooth } with no prefers-reduced-motion check

rule: Keep modals focused with one clear action and easy dismissal
do_pattern: Include visible close button escape key and backdrop click to close
dont_pattern: Open modal with no close button or way to dismiss
dont_code:
content
with no close or escape handler

rule: Use consistent card structure with clear content hierarchy
do_pattern: Apply uniform padding border-radius and shadow across all cards
dont_pattern: Mix different card styles padding and border-radius on same page

rule: Ensure visible focus indicators on all interactive elements
do_pattern: Add custom focus ring that is visible on all backgrounds
dont_pattern: Remove default focus outlines without replacement
